posts.author: Nata (Natalia )
posts.cookedHtml:
Go beyond the limitations of native automation with a new app from the ScriptRunner team: Advanced Automations for monday.com!

This new app provides you with the freedom to craft custom scripts in TypeScript or JavaScript, and enables complex task automation without the need for costly single-purpose apps or manual workarounds.

Our all-in-one scripting tool gives you total control over the monday.com API, delivering a cost-effective solution backed by the acclaimed ScriptRunner team. Because using multiple, low-code solutions for automation is so 2023 !

Try Advanced Automations for monday for free here: monday.com: Apps Marketplace
